metadata.title: Edu Learn - Master New Skills With Expert-Led Courses
metadata.description: Access high-quality video lessons, interactive quizzes, and earn verified certificates — all completely free.

footer.description: Edu Learn is a modern e-learning platform offering expert-led courses with AI-powered features, gamification, and verified certificates.
footer.developedBy: Developed by Edu Learn · Coded by Siphesihle Nathan Vilane

hero.heading: Master New Skills
hero.subtitle: Access high-quality video lessons, interactive quizzes, and earn verified certificates — all completely free.

features.heading: Everything you need to succeed
features.subtitle: A premium learning experience designed for modern learners, powered by cutting-edge AI technology.

items.title: AI-Powered Learning
items.description: Personalized recommendations, adaptive reviews, and an intelligent tutor to accelerate your progress.

items.title: Expert-Led Courses
items.description: Learn from industry professionals with structured curricula designed for real-world skills.

items.title: Gamified Experience
items.description: Earn XP, unlock badges, maintain streaks, and compete on leaderboards to stay motivated.

items.title: Verified Certificates
items.description: Earn blockchain-verified certificates upon course completion to showcase your achievements.

items.title: Study Together
items.description: Join study groups, discuss with peers, and collaborate on your learning journey.

items.title: Offline Access
items.description: Install as a PWA and access your courses even without an internet connection.

testimonials.heading: What our learners say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied learners transforming their careers with Edu Learn.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.content: Edu Learn completely changed how I approach learning. The AI tutor helped me grasp complex concepts in half the time.

items.name: Marcus Chen
items.content: The gamification system keeps me motivated. I've maintained a 50-day streak and earned 12 badges!

items.name: Priya Patel
items.content: The spaced repetition reviews are a game-changer. I retain information much better than with traditional courses.

items.name: James Wilson
items.content: Best free learning platform I've found. The blockchain certificates add real credibility to my portfolio.

featuredCourses.heading: Start learning today
featuredCourses.subtitle: Choose from our curated selection of high-quality courses, all available for free.

aiSection.heading: Learn smarter with AI
aiSection.subtitle: Get personalized course recommendations, instant answers from the AI tutor, and intelligent insights about your learning patterns.

cta.heading: Ready to start learning?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners on Edu Learn and transform your future today.
